name: Eight-Day Bread & Butter Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cucumbers in a crock.
2. Pour boiling water over the cucumbers to cover each day for four days. Use fresh water each day.
3. Keep the crock covered and cool.
4. On the fifth day, cut the cucumbers into 1/2 inch to 3/4 inch pieces.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients in a separate container and bring to a boil.
6. Pour the boiling mixture over the cut-up cucumbers in the crock.
7. Reheat the syrup each day for four days and pour it over the cucumbers.
8. Keep covered and cool at all other times.
9. Pack cucumbers into jars, leaving 1/2 inch headspace, then seal.
